subject: [PATCH v8 02/15] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE bit macros to uffd

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch renames the PTE bit macros related to userfaultfd (UFFD) tracking from 'uffd-wp' to just 'uffd'. This change is necessary because UFFD will use the same bit for access-tracking, distinct from mprotect(PROT_NONE) or NUMA-hinting PTEs. The rename is mechanical and does not introduce any behavior changes. It affects various architectures including x86, arm64, and riscv.
